title: Product Specification
description: Frontmatter and section contract for product/product.md — the product → execution contract. product.md is a living document. Its body must contain three structured sections (Features, Constraints, Priorities) that execution skills parse to generate tasks.

status.description: product.md is always locked when it exists. Draft product specs live in business/drafts/ until they advance into this file.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was locked.

source_draft.description: Relative path to the business draft that produced the most recent lock, if any.

required_body_sections.heading: Features
required_body_sections.description: Each feature has a name, a description, and a list of acceptance criteria. Every feature should have a stable identifier (slug or ordinal) that tasks can reference.

required_body_sections.heading: Constraints
required_body_sections.description: Technical and business constraints that scope the work. One per line or bulleted.

required_body_sections.heading: Priorities
required_body_sections.description: Ordered list or MoSCoW classification (Must / Should / Could / Won't).
